case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC VS. GABRIEL A GASCA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS AND IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
